docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, RICHARD
DEFENDANT REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE TO BE SUBMITTED TO JUDGE FOR SIGNATURE. $10.00 FEE PAID.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-27-2006, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO DEC-19-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 COURT ACCEPTS LATE FILING OF REQUEST SO THAT THIS ACTION MAY BE HEARD WITH CASE NO. 818649.
PLTF'S REQUEST FOR CHANGE OF COURT DATE SUBMITTED TO COURT FOR APPROVAL.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HOOK, HAROLD AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, RICHARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-27-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOOK, HAROLD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LEE, RICHARD ALTHOUGH THE COURT DOES NOT AWARD MONEY DAMAGES, THE COURT ORDERS DEFENDANT LEE TO CONTINUE TO HOLD PLAINTIFF'S PROPERTY FOR A PERIOD OF 90 DAYS AFTER THIS ORDER, AND TO COOPERATE WITH PLAINTIFF TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO RECOVER HIS PROPERTY WITHIN THAT TIME. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR CHANGE OF DATE, FILED. NO FEE-HAS FEE WAIVER.
REQUEST FOR CHANGE OF COURT DATE FILED BY PLTF WAS DENIED. ORDER CONTINUING THIS ACTION TO I2/19/06 AT 10:00AM STANDS.
